examples: The poem is too long to quote in its entirety.
The peace plan has not been accepted in its entirety by all parties.
Though the Swedish model appears workable for most American parents, it may not be accepted by them in its entirety.
American Slang will stream here in its entirety until its release on June 15.
Highway 2 is a ribbon of two-lane road that stretches across the entirety of Washington state.
